description: AuraTrade intent enforcement policy — paper trading demo

policies.description: Only allow trades in the authorized ticker universe
policies.message: Ticker {args.symbol} not in authorized universe [NVDA, AAPL, GOOGL, MSFT]

policies.description: Block single orders exceeding max_order_usd from intent.json
Block trades that would exceed the daily spending cap
policies.message: Daily spend limit of $20,000 would be exceeded

policies.description: Block trades that would make a single ticker more than 40% of portfolio
policies.message: Post-trade concentration for {args.symbol} would exceed 40% limit

policies.description: Block trades that would push technology sector above 60% of portfolio
policies.message: Tech sector exposure would exceed 60% limit

policies.description: Restrict trading to NYSE market hours only
Block trades within 2 days before or 1 day after earnings
policies.message: Trade blocked: earnings blackout window active for {args.symbol}

policies.description: Block buy orders if the same ticker was sold at a loss within 30 days
policies.message: Wash-sale prevention: {args.symbol} sold at loss within last 30 days

policies.description: Enforce strict role-based tool access control for each agent
Ensure trade details match the delegation token issued by Risk Agent
policies.condition: args.ticker != token.ticker OR args.side != token.action OR args.notional > token.max_amount_usd
policies.message: Order fields do not match delegation token scope

policies.description: Only TraderAgent may submit orders to execution
policies.message: Only TraderAgent may submit orders. Received from: {submitting_agent}

policies.description: Verify intent.json has not been tampered with since system startup
policies.message: intent_token_id mismatch — possible intent.json tampering detected

policies.description: Risk Agent must never call any write or execute tools
policies.message: RiskAgent attempted to call write tool '{tool}' — read-only constraint violated

policies.description: Prevent access to restricted or confidential data by unauthorized agents
policies.message: Data class {data_class} not accessible to agent {agent}
